message:
feat(replay): baseline-vs-candidate decision diff algorithm (ft-og6q6.5.2)

Adds DecisionDiff with tolerance-aware matching, root-cause attribution
(RuleDefinitionChange/InputDivergence/TimingShift), L0/L1/L2 equivalence
checking, and DiffSummary accounting. 26 unit + 18 proptest = 44 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
